text: (Translated from google translate) veoma losa hrana ne sluze kafu prije pauze a I imam 3 degree kancer koze. E"

translations.sr: (Translated from google translate) veoma loša hrana ne služe kafu pre pauze a i imam 3 degree kancer kože. E"
translations.sr_cyrl: (Translated from google translate) веома лоша храна не служе кафу пре паузе а и имам 3 degree канцер коже. Е"
translations.en: (Translated from google translate) very bad food, they don't serve coffee before break, and I have stage 3 skin cancer. Yeah"
translations.ru: (Translated from google translate) очень плохая еда, не подают кофе до перерыва, а у меня рак кожи 3 степени. Э"
translations.de: (Translated from google translate) sehr schlechtes Essen, sie servieren keinen Kaffee vor der Pause, und ich habe Hautkrebs im 3. Stadium. Tja"
translations.tr: (Translated from google translate) çok kötü yemek, moladan önce kahve servisi yapmıyorlar ve 3. derece cilt kanserim var. E"
